description: Style NoteTake nautical style to an all new high with this earthy pair from carlton london. With a innovative new update to the classic boat shoe, this versatile piece looks great with off-duty ensembles (not just lounge wear) The lovely leather upper and midsole is designed with a greased feel for a pared down, downtown cool. Style this with rolled up denims and a linen kurta for a minimalist look. Throw on a beige casual blazer and replace the tee for a linen casual shirt for a more dressy vibe. Product Details Brown square toed boat shoes with tassels and slip on stylingHas stitch detailing at the seams of the toe boxEyelets and braid detail around the mouth of the shoeMildly padded inner and a soft footbedTough midsole Rubber outsole upraised at the heelMaterial and CareLeatherUse a leather conditioner to clean productDo not store in direct sunlight
